feed.title: 烛龙国际医疗｜Aether Dragon Medical

entry.title: 烛龙国际医疗｜Aether Dragon Medical
entry.summary: 烛龙国际医疗｜Aether Dragon Medical 外国人来华就医一站式服务平台 One-Stop Medical Service in China for Foreign Patients 核心业务｜Core Services 1. 来华就医一站式咨询 One-Stop Consultation for Medical Treatment in China…
entry.content:
烛龙国际医疗｜Aether Dragon Medical
 
外国人来华就医一站式服务平台
 
One-Stop Medical Service in China for Foreign Patients
核心业务｜Core Services
 
1. 来华就医一站式咨询
One-Stop Consultation for Medical Treatment in China
 
• 病情分析与适配医院、科室、专家推荐
Condition analysis & recommendations for suitable hospitals, departments and specialists
 
• 治疗费用、周期、住院难度评估
Estimation of treatment cost, duration and hospitalization difficulty
 
• 签证、入境、住宿、生活相关咨询
Consultation on visa, entry, accommodation and daily life
 
2. 医院与专家精准匹配
Precise Matching of Hospitals & Specialists
 
• 骨科、肿瘤、心脑血管、微创、康复、中医等专科对接
Specialties including orthopedics, oncology, cardiovascular & cerebrovascular, minimally invasive surgery, rehabilitation, TCM, etc.
 
• 公立三甲 / 国际部 / 私立医院任选
Choice of top public hospitals, international departments or private hospitals
 
• 规避信息差，杜绝盲目就医
Avoid information gaps and inappropriate medical choices
 
3. 专业医疗翻译
Professional Medical Interpretation
 
• 门诊、检查、手术全程陪同翻译
On-site interpretation for outpatient, examinations and surgery
 
• 病历、诊断报告、处方专业翻译
Professional translation of medical records, reports and prescriptions
 
• 24小时紧急翻译支持
24/7 emergency interpretation service
 
4. 就医全程陪同
Full Journey Accompaniment
 
• 机场接机 → 住宿 → 医院全程衔接
Airport pickup → Accommodation → Hospital escort
 
• 代挂号、排队、缴费、取药、住院办理
Registration, queuing, payment, medicine collection and hospitalization on behalf
 
• 检查陪同、术后陪护与复查
Examination accompaniment, post-operation care and follow-up
 
5. 预约代办与绿色通道
Appointment & Fast Track Service
 
• 专家号加急预约
Expedited appointment for specialist clinics
 
• 住院床位协调与检查优先预约
Hospital bed coordination & priority examination booking
 
• 国际患者专属绿色通道
Exclusive green channel for international patients
 
6. 病历整理与跨境转诊
Medical Record Sorting & Cross-Border Referral
 
• 国外病历翻译、整理与标准化
Translation, sorting and standardization of overseas medical records
 
• 中国医生提前病情评估
Pre-evaluation by Chinese doctors in advance
 
• 跨境正式转诊协助
Assistance with formal cross-border medical referral
 
7. 生活与后勤保障
Life & Logistics Support
 
• 医院周边住宿安排
Accommodation arrangement near hospitals
 
• 饮食定制（清真、素食、欧美习惯）
Customized meals (Halal, vegetarian, Western habits)
 
• 交通接送与生活翻译
Transportation and daily life interpretation
 
8. 签证与入境辅助
Visa & Entry Assistance
 
• 医疗签证材料指导
Guidance on medical visa documents
 
• 就医邀请函协助
Assistance with medical invitation letters
 
• 入境流程与注意事项说明
Entry process guidance and tips
核心价值｜Core Value
 
• 解决语言不通，就医无法沟通
Solve language barriers for medical communication
 
• 精准对接中国优质医疗资源
Connect to high-quality medical resources in China
 
• 代办全流程，省去挂号、排队、住院难题
Handle the entire process to avoid registration, queuing and hospitalization troubles
 
• 杜绝乱收费与就医陷阱
Avoid overcharging and medical risks
 
• 全程专人陪同，来华就医安心无忧
Full-time accompaniment for safe and worry-free treatment
服务边界｜Service Boundary
 
• 不开展诊断、开药、治疗等医疗行为
We do NOT provide diagnosis, prescription or medical treatment
 
• 不承诺疗效、不夸大治疗效果
We do NOT promise cure rates or overstate treatment effects
 
• 不进行虚假医疗宣传
We do NOT conduct false medical advertising
 
仅提供：信息对接、专业翻译、全程陪同、流程代办
We only provide: information connection, professional translation, full accompaniment and process agency
Slogan｜宣传语
 
烛龙国际医疗：让外国人在中国看病更简单、更安全、更省心。
Aether Dragon Medical: Making medical care in China simpler, safer and more reassuring for foreign patients.

entry.title: 烛龙国际医疗
entry.summary: 烛龙国际医疗 | Candlelight International Medical Slogan（中英双语） 烛龙国际医疗：外国人来华就医一站式服务平台 Candlelight International Medical: Your One-Stop Platform for Medical Care in China 副标题（中英双语） 提供医院推荐、专家预约、专业翻译、全程陪诊，让海外患者在中国看病更简单、更安全、更省心。 We provide hospital…
entry.content:
烛龙国际医疗 | Candlelight International Medical

Slogan（中英双语）

烛龙国际医疗：外国人来华就医一站式服务平台
Candlelight International Medical: Your One-Stop Platform for Medical Care in China

副标题（中英双语）

提供医院推荐、专家预约、专业翻译、全程陪诊，让海外患者在中国看病更简单、更安全、更省心。
We provide hospital recommendations, expert appointments, professional interpretation, and full-service accompaniment — making healthcare in China simpler, safer, and more worry-free for international patients.

首页核心文案

第一部分：我们是谁（品牌定位）

中文
烛龙国际医疗，专注为海外患者提供来华就医的全流程支持。我们不诊断、不治疗，只做一件事：做你在中国的“医疗拐杖+翻译管家+全程向导”。从医院选择、专家预约，到翻译陪同、生活安排，我们让每一次就医都清晰、顺畅、安心。

English
Candlelight International Medical is dedicated to providing end-to-end support for international patients seeking medical care in China. We do not diagnose or treat — we do one thing well: being your “medical anchor, interpreter, and guide” in China. From hospital selection and specialist appointments to interpretation and daily logistics, we make every step clear, smooth, and stress-free.

第二部分：我们能为你做什么（核心业务）

中文模块

1. 来华就医一站式咨询
病情适合哪家医院？治疗要多久？费用多少？签证怎么办理？——我们一次性帮你理清。

2. 医院&专家精准匹配
骨科、肿瘤、心脑血管、微创、康复、中医……根据你的病情，精准推荐公立三甲、国际部或私立医院，避免乱找、被骗、找不到对口专家。

3. 就医翻译（老外最大痛点）
门诊陪同、检查沟通、手术翻译、病历报告翻译、24小时紧急支持。让语言不再成为治疗的障碍。

4. 就医全程陪同（高客单服务）
从接机、住宿、挂号、排队、缴费、取药，到检查、住院、手术、术后复查，全程有人陪、有人管。

5. 预约代办（老外自己完全搞不定）
专家号加急、住院床位协调、检查项目提前预约、国际患者绿色通道——你只需安心看病，其余交给我们。

6. 病历整理&跨境转诊
国外病历翻译整理，提前传送中国医生评估，出具接诊意见，协助正式转诊。

7. 生活&后勤保障
医院附近住宿、清真/素食/欧美饮食习惯协调、交通接送、生活翻译，让你安心治病，不为琐事分心。

8. 签证&入境辅助
医疗签证材料指导、邀请函协助、入境流程说明，从落地前就开始照顾你。

English Modules

1. One-Stop Medical Consultation
Which hospital is best for your condition? How long will treatment take? What’s the cost? How do I get a visa? — We provide clear answers to all your questions before you arrive.

2. Hospital & Specialist Matching
Orthopedics, oncology, cardiology, minimally invasive surgery, rehabilitation, traditional Chinese medicine — we match you with the right specialist and hospital (public tertiary, international, or private), ensuring you avoid scams and misdirection.

3. Medical Interpretation (The Biggest Pain Point)
Clinic accompaniment, exam and surgery interpretation, medical record and prescription translation, 24/7 emergency support. We remove the language barrier from your healthcare journey.

4. Full-Service Patient Accompaniment (Premium Service)
From airport pickup, accommodation, registration, payment, and pharmacy pickup, to tests, hospitalization, surgery, and post-op follow-ups — we stay with you every step of the way.

5. Appointment & Coordination Services
Expedited specialist appointments, hospital bed coordination, advance scheduling for tests, and an international patient green channel — you focus on your health, and we handle the logistics.

6. Medical Records & Cross-Border Referral
We translate and organize your medical records, share them with Chinese doctors for preliminary assessment, and assist with the official referral process.

7. Logistics & Daily Support
We arrange nearby accommodations, coordinate meals (halal, vegetarian, or Western diets), provide transportation, and offer daily life interpretation.

8. Visa & Arrival Assistance
We guide you through medical visa requirements, help with invitation letters, and explain entry procedures — so you’re supported even before you land.

第三部分：我们解决什么刚需？

中文

外国人来华就医，最怕的是什么？

  • 不懂中文，看病无法沟通

  • 不知道哪家医院好、哪个专家对

  • 不会挂号、不会预约、不会走流程

  • 怕被骗、怕被乱收费

  • 人生地不熟，来了没人管

  • 国外看病贵、排队久，想在中国又快又便宜

我们就是你的：
拐杖 + 管家 + 翻译 + 向导

English

What worries international patients the most?

  • Language barrier: can’t communicate during medical visits

  • Don’t know which hospital or specialist is the right fit

  • Can’t navigate registration, appointments, or hospital procedures

  • Fear of being scammed or overcharged

  • No local support upon arrival

  • High costs and long wait times abroad — seeking efficient, affordable care in China

We are your:
Anchor + Coordinator + Interpreter + Guide

第四部分：我们不做的事（建立信任）

中文

我们不看病、不开药、不诊断、不治疗。
不承诺治愈率、不打包票疗效。
不做夸大医疗广告。
我们只做三件事：信息对接 + 翻译 + 流程代办。

English

We do not diagnose, prescribe, or treat.
We do not promise cure rates or guarantee medical outcomes.
We do not engage in exaggerated medical advertising.
We do three things: information matching, interpretation, and process coordination.

第五部分：立即咨询（行动号召）

中文

📞 让烛龙国际医疗，成为你在中国最可靠的医疗伙伴。
无论你在哪个国家，只要决定来华就医，我们就能在第一时间为你启动全程服务。

👉 点击咨询 / 留下你的信息，我们将在24小时内联系你。

English

📞 Make Candlelight International Medical your most trusted healthcare partner in China.
No matter where you are in the world, once you decide to seek care in China, we’re ready to support you — from the very first step.

👉 Contact us / Leave your information, and we’ll get back to you within 24 hours.
